from __future__ import annotations


class Result:
    def __init__(self, task_id: str) -> None:
        self.id = task_id


class Task:
    def delay(self, value: int) -> Result:
        return Result(task_id=f"job-{value}")


def celery_result_get_inside_task_negative(value: int) -> str:
    task = Task()
    return task.delay(value).id
